LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EVA RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS SET ONE. THE CAUSE IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. COURT ADOPTS THE JUDGE PRO TEM'S RECOMMENDATION AS MY TENTATIVE RULING. AS TO DOCUMENT REQUESTS 8, 51-52, 54-56, 58, 60-64, 66-70, 72-74, THE MOTION IS GRANTED, LIMITED TO THE FUNCTIONS AT ISSUE WITH THE TRANSMISSION RAISED IN THE REPAIR REQUESTS. (SEE HAW DEC. PARA. 5-8.) AS TO DOCUMENT REQUESTS 8, 80, 90-93, 105, THE MOTION IS GRANTED, LIMITED TO THE 2013 FORD FIESTA WITH THE SAME TRANSMISSION AND SYNC SYSTEM. AS TO DOCUMENT REQUEST 8, THE MOTION IS GRANTED, LIMITED TO THE PARTS OF THE MANUAL RELATED TO THE 2013 FORD FIESTA WITH THE SAME TRANSMISSION AND SYNC SYSTEM. DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO THESE REQUESTS SHALL BE PRODUCED AFTER A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS ENTERED. COURT ORDERS COMPLIANCE NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 26, 2016. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: AMY PERRY, CSR #11880, BUS. TEL: 800-333-2082, EMAIL: CALENDAR@HUSEBY.COM.

THE COURT AGREES WITH THE RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM THAT THERE IS GOOD CAUSE FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER, BUT THAT SECTION 8(C) OF FORD'S PROPOSED ORDER IS OVERLY RESTRICTED AND SHOULD BE AMENDED IN THE WAY PROPOSED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christine Haw, of Strategic Legal Practices, APC, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Stephen H. Dye, of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP, Tel. 415.364.6713, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF EVA RODRIGUEZ Motion For: (1) Terminating, Issue, And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions; Or, In The Alternative (2) An Order Compelling Compliance With The Courts Discovery Orders is denied as premature as to sanctions and granted as to an order compelling compliance with the Court's discovery orders. Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For A Protective Order - Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion is granted in large part. The court agrees with the recommendation of the Judge Pro Tem that there is good cause for a protective order, but that section 8(c) of Ford's proposed order is overly restricted and should be amended in the way proposed by the Judge Pro Tem. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Docs Set One
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christine Haw of Strategic Legal Practices APC (310-277-1040) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Richard J. May of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis (415-364-6727) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party, Ford Motor Co.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF EVA RODRIGUEZ'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Docs Set One is GRANTED. Court adopts the judge pro tem's recommendation as my tentative ruling. As to document requests 8, 51-52, 54-56, 58, 60-64, 66-70, 72-74, the motion is GRANTED, limited to the functions at issue with the transmission raised in the repair requests. (See Haw Dec. para. 5-8.) As to document requests 8, 80, 90-93, 105, the motion is GRANTED, limited to the 2013 Ford Fiesta with the same transmission and Sync system. As to document request 8, the motion is GRANTED, limited to the parts of the manual related to the 2013 Ford Fiesta with the same transmission and Sync system. Documents responsive to these requests shall be produced after a protective order is entered. Court orders compliance no later than September 26, 2016. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Amy Perry, CSR #11880, Bus. Tel: 800-333-2082, email: calendar@huseby.com. (D302)
